subject: TLDR AI 2026-04-05
body_text:
TLDR AI — April 5, 2026

Big Tech & Startups

OpenAI launches GPT-6 with 10M context window (5 minute read)
https://example.com/gpt6
OpenAI announced GPT-6 today, featuring a 10 million token context window and native video understanding. Early benchmarks show a 40% improvement on reasoning tasks over GPT-5.

Google announces Gemini 3 Ultra for enterprise (4 minute read)
https://example.com/gemini3
Gemini 3 Ultra targets Fortune 500 customers with on-prem deployment and SOC 2 certification. Pricing starts at $500k annually.

Science & Futuristic Technology

Anthropic open-sources new interpretability tool (3 minute read)
https://example.com/anthropic-interp
The tool visualizes which neurons activate for specific concepts inside Claude, making model behavior more transparent.

Meta's new AR glasses weigh 40 grams (6 minute read)
https://example.com/meta-ar
Meta unveiled its lightest AR glasses yet at a developer event, featuring all-day battery and full SLAM tracking.

Programming, Design & Data Science

Rust 2.0 edition ships (2 minute read)
https://example.com/rust2
The long-awaited Rust 2.0 edition brings async traits to stable and a new borrow checker that eliminates 30% of common lifetime errors.
